zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth De Wannerville於1320年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾海姆斯沃斯時，她的父親Adam De Wannerville26歲，母親Mrs. Adam Wannerville24歲。她於1338年與Nicholas De Wortley在英國越可爾巴斯利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1382年10月20日在英國越可爾享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾海姆斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth De Wannerville于1320年出生在英国英格兰越可爾海姆斯沃斯时，她的父亲Adam De Wannerville26岁，母亲Mrs. Adam Wannerville24岁。她于1338年与Nicholas De Wortley在英国越可爾巴斯利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1382年10月20日在英国越可爾享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾海姆斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth De Wannerville was born in 1320, in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Adam De Wannerville, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Adam Wannerville, was 24. She married Nicholas De Wortley in 1338, in Barnsley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 October 1382, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Hemsworth, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth De Wannerville est née en 1320, à Hemsworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam De Wannerville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Adam Wannerville, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas De Wortley en 1338, à Barnsley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1382, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Hemsworth, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth De Wannerville 1320 in Hemsworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam De Wannerville 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Adam Wannerville 24. Sie hat 1338 in Barnsley, Yorkshire, England Nicholas De Wortley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Lei sposato Nicholas De Wortley nel 1338, nel Barnsley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Wannervilleが1320年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヘムスウオルスで生まれた時，父Adam De Wannervilleは26歳，母Mrs. Adam Wannervilleは24歳であった。1338年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバーンスリーでNicholas De Wortleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1382年10月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアヘムスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth De Wannerville(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 헤스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam De Wannerville(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Adam Wannerville(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1338년 영국 요르크실르 바른슬리에서 Nicholas De Wortley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1382년 10월 20일 영국 요르크실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 헤스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth De Wannerville nasceu em 1320, em Hemsworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam De Wannerville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Adam Wannerville, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas De Wortley em 1338, em Barnsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1382, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Hemsworth, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth De Wannerville родилась в 1320 г. в местности хемсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Adam De Wannerville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Adam Wannerville, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas De Wortley в 1338 г. в местности барнсли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 октября 1382 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности хемсворт, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Nicholas De Wortley en 1338, en Barnsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1382, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Hemsworth, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
